_comment: Mini eval harness (GAP-6): labeled predicate -> expected-candidate cases against the mock registry fixture. The organizer must retrieve exactly the labeled candidate set (recall AND precision 1.0 on this synthetic benchmark) — no unbenchmarked quality claims. Expected ids are RETRIEVAL labels: a candidate with visibly unmatched criteria (e.g. a male-only trial for a female patient) is still expected, because the organizer shows the basis rather than silently filtering; the physician reviews it. All ids are fictional.
